SALEM. This is Jerusalem. In Salem also is set His tabernacle, And His dwelling place in Zion (Ps. 76:3) is proof of this.

work they must perform. I do not wish to injure them. They must have their day. Their time and season are allotted to them, the same as to all men for good or for evil. They can do us no harm—they can do nothing against the truth. The Lord will make the wicked and the ungodly and their acts accomplish his design, for, “Surely the wrath of man shall praise thee: the remainder of wrath shalt thou…
